title: physocarpus pauciflorus
intro: Physocarpus pauciflorus, also known as ninebark, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, and it has been used to treat various ailments such as gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Physocarpus pauciflorus is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, with the roots and bark being the most commonly used parts.
